utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (each must include costs, and the total_budget must include a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). 1) health_coverage: includes plan name, monthly cost, some policy details. It includes costs; acceptable. 2) property_coverage: includes monthly cost and description; acceptable. 3) travel_coverage: includes monthly cost and description; acceptable. 4) additional_services: states None; but format requires any enhancement services with costs; 'None' is acceptable as a fully specified choice with implied €0 cost. 5) total_budget: provides €155/month total and mentions savings and effective date, but does not include an annual cost breakdown. The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; annual cost is missing. Therefore, this item is not fully specified. Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health, Basic Photography Protection for property, and Basic Travel Insurance for travel. From the ground-truth ratings, LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with a rating of 9. There is no exact match for 'Basic Photography Protection' or 'Basic Travel Insurance' in the ground-truth property_protection or travel_insurance options; therefore, only the LifeFirst item can be mapped to a rating.
